userMessage: Build a protocol_debug flow. Channels: CH1. Protocols explicitly in scope: CAN. Measurement goals: protocol decode / trigger / search. Suggested checks to cover: protocol configuration, protocol trigger/search, artifact capture.

response.text:
Built a compact CAN protocol debug flow for CH1 using verified bus decode, bus trigger, bus search, config checks, and screenshot capture.

ACTIONS_JSON: {"summary":"Verified CAN protocol debug flow for CH1 on MSO2-family scope using bus decode on B1, bus-triggered acquisition, bus search, config queries, screenshot capture, and error check.","findings":["Improved the workspace by replacing conflicting/incomplete CH1 edge/I2C/measurement fragments with a focused CAN bus flow.","Resource warning applies: because CH1 is the decode source, bus triggering on B1 is preferred over plain CH1 edge trigger.","`SEARCH:SEARCH1:STATE 1` was provided in planner-resolved verified context and used directly; the batch materializer did not re-resolve that header in this turn.","CAN-specific search qualification details such as ID/data/error matching were not fully verified in this turn, so the flow sets up the bus search scaffold and leaves deeper filtering as a manual follow-on."],"suggestedFixes":["Remove duplicate connect steps and incomplete commands like `BUS:B1:I2C:CLOCk:SOUrce` / `BUS:B1:I2C:CLOCk:THReshold` from the existing workspace.","If you need CAN FD or CAN XL, change `BUS:B1:CAN:STANDard CAN2X` to the appropriate verified standard before running.","If you need trigger/search on a specific CAN identifier or data payload, add the exact CAN-specific trigger/search qualifier headers after confirming them in the browser or MCP lookup."],"actions":[{"type":"connect","label":"Connect","params":{"instrumentIds":["MSO6B"],"printIdn":true}},{"type":"comment","label":"Comment","params":{"text":"Protocol debug flow for CAN on CH1. Uses B1 for decode, A trigger on BUS, SEARCH1 on BUS, then captures a screenshot."}},{"type":"write","label":"Set CAN Bus Type","params":{"command":"BUS:B1:TYPe CAN"}},{"type":"write","label":"Set CAN Source","params":{"command":"BUS:B1:CAN:SOUrce CH1"}},{"type":"write","label":"Set CAN Standard","params":{"command":"BUS:B1:CAN:STANDard CAN2X"}},{"type":"write","label":"Show Bus Decode","params":{"command":"DISplay:WAVEView1:BUS:B1:STATE ON"}},{"type":"query","label":"Query CAN Standard","params":{"command":"BUS:B1:CAN:STANDard?","saveAs":"can_standard_b1"}},{"type":"write","label":"Set Trigger Type BUS","params":{"command":"TRIGger:A:TYPe BUS"}},{"type":"write","label":"Set CAN Trigger Condition","params":{"command":"TRIGger:A:BUS:B1:CAN:CONDition SOF"}},{"type":"write","label":"Set Trigger Mode","params":{"command":"TRIGger:A:MODe NORMal"}},{"type":"query","label":"Query CAN Trigger Condition","params":{"command":"TRIGger:A:BUS:B1:CAN:CONDition?","saveAs":"can_trigger_condition_b1"}},{"type":"write","label":"Select SEARCH1","params":{"command":"SEARCH:SELected SEARCH1"}},{"type":"write","label":"Enable SEARCH1","params":{"command":"SEARCH:SEARCH1:STATE 1"}},{"type":"write","label":"Set SEARCH1 Trigger Type","params":{"command":"SEARCH:SEARCH1:TRIGger:A:TYPe BUS"}},{"type":"write","label":"Set SEARCH1 Bus Source","params":{"command":"SEARCH:SEARCH1:TRIGger:A:BUS:SOUrce B1"}},{"type":"comment","label":"Comment","params":{"text":"SEARCH1 is configured for CAN bus activity on B1. Add CAN-specific ID/data/error qualifiers manually if you need filtered hits."}},{"type":"save_screenshot","label":"Save Screenshot","params":{"filename":"can_protocol_debug_ch1.png","scopeType":"modern","method":"pc_transfer"}},{"type":"error_check","label":"Error Check","params":{"command":"ALLEV?"}},{"type":"disconnect","label":"Disconnect","params":{"instrumentIds":["MSO6B"]}}]}

actionsJson.summary: Verified CAN protocol debug flow for CH1 on MSO2-family scope using bus decode on B1, bus-triggered acquisition, bus search, config queries, screenshot capture, and error check.
findings: Improved the workspace by replacing conflicting/incomplete CH1 edge/I2C/measurement fragments with a focused CAN bus flow.
Resource warning applies: because CH1 is the decode source, bus triggering on B1 is preferred over plain CH1 edge trigger.
`SEARCH:SEARCH1:STATE 1` was provided in planner-resolved verified context and used directly; the batch materializer did not re-resolve that header in this turn.

CAN-specific search qualification details such as ID/data/error matching were not fully verified in this turn, so the flow sets up the bus search scaffold and leaves deeper filtering as a manual follow-on.
suggestedFixes: Remove duplicate connect steps and incomplete commands like `BUS:B1:I2C:CLOCk:SOUrce` / `BUS:B1:I2C:CLOCk:THReshold` from the existing workspace.
If you need CAN FD or CAN XL, change `BUS:B1:CAN:STANDard CAN2X` to the appropriate verified standard before running.
If you need trigger/search on a specific CAN identifier or data payload, add the exact CAN-specific trigger/search qualifier headers after confirming them in the browser or MCP lookup.

params.text: Protocol debug flow for CAN on CH1. Uses B1 for decode, A trigger on BUS, SEARCH1 on BUS, then captures a screenshot.
SEARCH1 is configured for CAN bus activity on B1. Add CAN-specific ID/data/error qualifiers manually if you need filtered hits.
